titleStmt.title: SII 31.132: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 132. (A.R. No. B 325 of 1938.) PRĀTAKŌṬA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: A broken slab set up in front of the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1522, Parīdhāvi, Māgha śu. 15, Irregular.

It registers the gift of lands (?) for maintaining the offerings and perpetual lamps in the temples of Nāgēśvaradēva, Vīrabhadra, Gaṇādhipati, Mayilāradēva and Vaishṇava temples like Chaṁnakēśava perumāḷ, Hanumaṁtha, etc., at Prātakōṭa by Nārayaṇayya, son of Purāṇāṁ Bhūpayya. The gift is said to have been given for the merit of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Gōpālayyarājayyadēva, during the reigning period of Veṁkaṭapatidēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
ṁbulu 1522 Agunēṭi paridhāvisaṁvatsara māgha
śu 15lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapamēśvada(ra) śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēvamahārāyalu penu
goṁḍapaṭṭaṇamaṁdu pṛdhivī sāmrājyaṁ sēyu
cuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
rāmarāja gōpāḷarājayyadēva mahā
rājulayyavāriki puṇyaṁgānu purāṇaṁ
bhūpayya komāruḍu nārāyaṇayya prā
takōṭa nāgēśvaradēvara vīrabhadradēvara gaṇā
dhipatidēvara mayilāru dēvaramōdalayina dē
vasdhānālakuṁnu caṁnakēśavaperumāḷu ha
numaṁtuḍu mōdalayina viṣṇu sdhānālaku
ṁnu naivēdya dīpārādhanalaku cēlli vaccēkṣētrālō
kaṁgānu trikaraṇaśudhigānu
ri yigānu sarvamu nyā
na śilā śāsanaṁ . ṁ yiṁ
dhaṁ talacinānu ta
lō vadhiṁcina pā nabōvu vāru gō
sina pāpānaṁbōvuvāru mātṛga
sinaṁjēsina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru
paradattānu pālana ya
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ ya
yō harēta va
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi śrī
Digital edition of SII 31.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
